text: Which services are in the STS portfolio?
advice_text: The two digital services in STS are Plan Tech and Digital Standards.

text: Where is the prototype hosted for Plan Tech?
advice_text: Heroku is the hosting site for the Plan Tech prototype.

text: What do we use for content management?
advice_text: Our content management system (CMS) is Contentful, with backups and caching handled by Redis.

text: What is unusual about Plan Tech's authentication?
advice_text: We use DfE Sign-In's Test environment for both our Dev and Test environments, as their Dev environment can be unstable.

text: What must you do if you push sensitive data to GitHub?
advice_text: You must tell the Tech Lead, revert the changes, rotate all relevant secrets or keys and raise a security incident.

text: What types of testing do we regularly use on Plan Tech?
advice_text: We use a combination of unit, integration, mutation, end-to-end (E2E) and manual testing.

text: What content type should you use to create a new recommendation?
advice_text: The Recommedation Chunk is used to generate new recommendations, with text content added to its Content field.

text: How can you find User Research participants?
advice_text: You can recruit UR participants from our local list or the DfE user research participant register.

text: What is the password for the prototype?
advice_text: The password and link to the prototype can be found in the Design section of the Wiki.

text: What tool do we use for managing our backlog?
advice_text: We use Azure DevOps (ADO) for managing backlogs, ticket creation and secure documentation storage.

text: What step is required before an approved ticket can be brought into a sprint?
advice_text: Once a ticket is approved by the Product Manager, it should be added to the agenda for the next team refinement session, after which it can be added to a sprint.

text: Who needs to be informed if the Plan Tech experiences an outage?
advice_text: You (or another member of the team) should alert the Service Owner and Service Delivery Manager, and ensure there is a ServiceNow incident ticket raised.
